title: One String, Two Universes
tagline: The same short-id an AI calls as an MCP tool is the bytes a phone runs from a QR.
holy_shit: The exact bytes an AI invokes as an MCP tool are provably the exact bytes a stranger's phone runs from a QR — corrupt one and both refuse at the same instant.
agent_scenario: When the same verified capability must be callable by an AI (MCP, no browser) and a human (QR, no install) with identical trust.
author: kody-w + Claude
